case_title: QI Q WU VS. KERRY ALAN BROWN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF QI Q WU. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KERRY ALAN BROWN. CINDY WONG WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS CANTONESE SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MR. WU. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-18-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-30-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, QI Q AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KERRY ALAN
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CERTIFIED MAILED CLAIM SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTIES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,722.09 FILED BY WU, QI Q AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, KERRY ALAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF NEEDS MORE TIME FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WU, QI Q
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
